PHYS-REVIEW-01.mechanism: Temperature sampling binds a stable hwmon path but does not require an approved CPU sensor identity.
PHYS-REVIEW-01.consequence: A non-CPU sensor could satisfy the temperature custody threshold.
PHYS-REVIEW-01.minimal_repair: Bind a manifest-approved CPU sensor identity by resolved path plus approved hwmon name and label.
PHYS-REVIEW-01.required_regression: Place a non-CPU hwmon sensor first and confirm rejection.

OPER-REVIEW-01.mechanism: Active query observations are collapsed into one A-minus-B contrast sample labeled query_A.
OPER-REVIEW-01.consequence: Per-query and query-order operator effects are not identified by the gated analysis.
OPER-REVIEW-01.minimal_repair: Represent query effects and query-order interactions explicitly without collapsing all active queries into one label.
OPER-REVIEW-01.required_regression: A query-order-only effect must be detected by the operator analysis.

OPER-REVIEW-02.mechanism: Mapping and delay holdouts retain those factor levels in training via replicate 0.
OPER-REVIEW-02.consequence: The gate proves restricted replicate prediction, not strict held-out mapping or delay prediction.
OPER-REVIEW-02.minimal_repair: Use strict factor-held-out gates or rename and contractually narrow the gate.
OPER-REVIEW-02.required_regression: Mapping-scrambled and delay-scrambled packets that retain pooled contrasts must remain candidate.

OPER-REVIEW-03.mechanism: Cross-validated classification is asserted as true in the summary.
OPER-REVIEW-03.consequence: A classification failure would not currently gate the observed result class.
OPER-REVIEW-03.minimal_repair: Compute and gate classification success from the confusion matrix.
OPER-REVIEW-03.required_regression: A deliberately confused codeword packet must fail the classification gate.

OPER-REVIEW-04.mechanism: Lifetime reporting remains incomplete relative to the contract vocabulary and variation decomposition.
OPER-REVIEW-04.consequence: State-lifetime claims are not ready for authorization.
OPER-REVIEW-04.minimal_repair: Emit contract-vocabulary lifetime classes with explicit session and mapping variation gates.
OPER-REVIEW-04.required_regression: Interleaved or variation-confounded lifetime packets must be rejected or downgraded.
